attractions.name: 🕌 Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
attractions.desc: One of the world's largest mosques, featuring stunning white marble architecture and massive crystal chandeliers.

attractions.name: 🏎️ Ferrari World
attractions.desc: An indoor theme park on Yas Island featuring Formula Rossa, the world's fastest roller coaster.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Louvre Abu Dhabi
attractions.desc: A breathtaking art and civilization museum housed under a massive floating dome structure.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Amman Citadel
attractions.desc: A historic site on a hill overlooking downtown Amman, featuring the Temple of Hercules.

attractions.name: 🎭 Roman Theatre
attractions.desc: A beautifully preserved 6,000-seat theater dating back to the 2nd century.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Rainbow Street
attractions.desc: A bustling street lined with rooftop cafes, art galleries, and local handicraft shops.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Anitkabir
attractions.desc: The grand mausoleum of Mustafa Kemal Atatürk, the founder of modern Turkey.

attractions.name: 🏰 Ankara Castle
attractions.desc: An ancient fortification offering beautiful panoramic views of the city's historic quarters.

attractions.name: 🏺 Museum of Anatolian Civilizations
attractions.desc: An exceptional museum housing priceless artifacts from the Paleolithic to Hittite eras.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Monument of Neutrality
attractions.desc: A striking three-legged arch topped by a gold-plated statue that rotates with the sun.

attractions.name: 📚 Wedding Palace
attractions.desc: A unique, massive geometric building shaped like a star enclosing a globe.

attractions.name: 🐎 Independence Square
attractions.desc: The central square flanked by opulent white-marble palaces and monuments.

attractions.name: 🗼 Bayterek Tower
attractions.desc: An iconic observation tower shaped like a golden egg resting in the branches of a mythical tree.

attractions.name: ⛺ Khan Shatyr
attractions.desc: A massive, futuristic tent-shaped architectural structure holding an indoor park and beach.

attractions.name: 🕌 Hazrat Sultan Mosque
attractions.desc: One of the largest mosques in Central Asia, featuring classic Islamic style elements.

attractions.name: ⚔️ Al-Shaheed Monument
attractions.desc: A striking turquoise split-dome monument dedicated to fallen soldiers.

attractions.name: 📚 Al-Mutanabbi Street
attractions.desc: The historic heart of Baghdad's literary and intellectual life, packed with bookstalls.

attractions.name: 🏺 National Museum of Iraq
attractions.desc: Contains invaluable treasures from ancient Mesopotamian, Babylonian, and Persian civilizations.

attractions.name: 🔥 Flame Towers
attractions.desc: A trio of flame-shaped skyscrapers completely covered in LED screens that light up at night.

attractions.name: 🧱 Old City (Icherisheher)
attractions.desc: The ancient fortress heart of Baku, featuring the historic Maiden Tower and Shirvanshahs' Palace.

attractions.name: 〰️ Heydar Aliyev Center
attractions.desc: A modern architectural masterpiece designed by Zaha Hadid, famous for its flowing, curved lines.

attractions.name: 🕌 Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque
attractions.desc: A magnificent royal mosque surrounded by an artificial lagoon and a ceremonial stone barge.

attractions.name: 🌊 Kampong Ayer
attractions.desc: A massive, historic water village built entirely on stilts over the Brunei River.

attractions.name: 👑 Istana Nurul Iman
attractions.desc: The official residence of the Sultan, recognized as one of the world's largest residential palaces.

attractions.name: 🛕 The Grand Palace
attractions.desc: A spectacular complex of buildings that has served as the official royal residence since 1782.

attractions.name: 🕌 Wat Arun
attractions.desc: A majestic riverside temple known for its distinct porcelain-encrusted spires that glow at sunrise.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Chatuchak Weekend Market
attractions.desc: One of the largest outdoor weekend markets in the world, containing over 15,000 diverse stalls.

attractions.name: 🏰 The Forbidden City
attractions.desc: The world's largest palace complex, serving as the imperial home for nearly 500 years.

attractions.name: 🧱 Great Wall of China (Badaling/Mutianyu)
attractions.desc: The iconic ancient defensive structure snaking along mountains outside the city center.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Tiananmen Square
attractions.desc: A massive public square at the city's heart, holding great historical and political significance.

attractions.name: 🌊 Pigeon Rocks (Raouche)
attractions.desc: Two stunning, gigantic natural rock formations standing off the coast in the Mediterranean Sea.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum of Beirut
attractions.desc: The principal archaeological museum tracking Lebanon's deep history from prehistory to the Mamluk period.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Mohammad Al-Amin Mosque
attractions.desc: An imposing blue-domed mosque that forms a defining feature of the Beirut skyline.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Ala-Too Square
attractions.desc: The vast central public square featuring regular military guard-changing ceremonies.

attractions.name: 🌳 Oak Park
attractions.desc: One of the city's oldest open spaces, filled with centuries-old trees and open-air sculptures.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Osh Bazaar
attractions.desc: A vibrant, bustling market where you can buy traditional Kyrgyz goods, clothing, and fresh food.

attractions.name: 🕌 Umayyad Mosque
attractions.desc: One of the oldest and largest mosque complexes in the world, located in the ancient walled city.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Al-Hamidiyah Souq
attractions.desc: The largest and most famous central covered shopping bazaar in Syria.

attractions.name: 🏰 Citadel of Damascus
attractions.desc: A massive medieval stone fortress built at the northwest corner of the Old City.

attractions.name: 🏰 Lalbagh Fort
attractions.desc: An incomplete 17th-century Mughal fort complex featuring a mosque and tomb.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Ahsan Manzil
attractions.desc: The striking pink palace that formerly served as the official seat of the Nawab of Dhaka.

attractions.name: 🚢 Sadarghat
attractions.desc: A chaotic, high-energy river port on the Buriganga River, processing thousands of boats daily.

attractions.name: 🗽 Cristo Rei of Dili
attractions.desc: A giant 27-meter tall statue of Jesus standing atop a globe at the end of a scenic peninsula.

attractions.name: 🏖️ Areia Branca Beach
attractions.desc: A beautiful white sand beach lined with excellent local cafes and seafood shacks.

attractions.name: 🧶 Tais Market
attractions.desc: The premier spot to purchase traditional hand-woven textiles created by local weavers.

attractions.name: 🎨 Museum of Islamic Art
attractions.desc: An iconic building on the corniche housing an incredible collection of art spanning 1,400 years.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Souq Waqif
attractions.desc: A traditional market selling garments, spices, handicrafts, and host to excellent restaurants.

attractions.name: 🌊 The Pearl-Qatar
attractions.desc: A luxurious man-made Mediterranean-style island featuring yacht-lined marinas and boardwalks.

attractions.name: 🏙️ Burj Khalifa
attractions.desc: The tallest building and structural skyscraper in the world, dominating the city's modern skyline.

attractions.name: 🛍️ The Dubai Mall
attractions.desc: A massive entertainment and retail complex featuring an indoor aquarium, ice rink, and shops.

attractions.name: 🏝️ Palm Jumeirah
attractions.desc: An extraordinary man-made archipelago shaped like a palm tree, home to luxury resorts.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Kohi Navruz
attractions.desc: A breathtaking modern palace showcasing intricate Tajik wood carvings, mosaics, and gems.

attractions.name: ⛲ Rudaki Park
attractions.desc: A lushly manicured green space featuring monumental statues and dancing fountains.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum of Tajikistan
attractions.desc: Housed under a large dome, it details the region's ancient and medieval history.

attractions.name: 🌊 Hoan Kiem Lake
attractions.desc: A peaceful lake in the center of the city, featuring the historic red Huc Bridge and Ngoc Son Temple.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Hanoi Old Quarter
attractions.desc: A historic neighborhood featuring narrow streets packed with street food vendors and colonial architecture.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
attractions.desc: The grand resting place of the revolutionary leader, set within Ba Dinh Square.

attractions.name: 🕌 Faisal Mosque
attractions.desc: An iconic desert tent-shaped mosque, globally famous for its contemporary architecture and lack of traditional domes.

attractions.name: ⛰️ Daman-e-Koh
attractions.desc: A hill-top viewpoint nestled in the Margalla Hills, providing panoramic views of the entire capital layout.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Pakistan Monument
attractions.desc: A blooming flower-petal shaped monument symbolizing the integration of Pakistan's provinces.

attractions.name: 🗼 National Monument (Monas)
attractions.desc: A towering 132-meter obelisk in Merdeka Square, topped with a flame coated in gold foil.

attractions.name: 🕌 Istiqlal Mosque
attractions.desc: The largest mosque in Southeast Asia, built opposite the Jakarta Cathedral to symbolize harmony.

attractions.name: 🧱 Kota Tua
attractions.desc: The historic old town center filled with Dutch colonial architecture and cobblestone squares.

attractions.name: 🕌 Dome of the Rock
attractions.desc: An iconic golden-domed Islamic shrine located on the Temple Mount plat plateau.

attractions.name: 🧱 The Western Wall
attractions.desc: An ancient limestone wall in the Old City, highly revered as a holy place of prayer.

attractions.name: ⛪ Church of the Holy Sepulchre
attractions.desc: A major Christian pilgrimage destination located within the historic Christian Quarter.

attractions.name: 🌳 Gardens of Babur
attractions.desc: A historic park containing the tomb of the first Mughal Emperor, Babur, laid out in terraced levels.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum of Afghanistan
attractions.desc: A historic institution archiving a rich collection of ancient Buddhist and Islamic items.

attractions.name: 🌊 Qargha Lake
attractions.desc: A popular reservoir resort area offering boating, golfing, and lakeside boardwalk dining.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Kathmandu Durbar Square
attractions.desc: The ancient royal palace square complex showcasing traditional Newari wood craftsmanship.

attractions.name: 👁️ Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple)
attractions.desc: An ancient hilltop religious complex painted with the iconic wisdom eyes of Buddha.

attractions.name: 🛕 Pashupatinath Temple
attractions.desc: A famous, sacred Hindu temple complex situated on the banks of the Bagmati River.

attractions.name: 🗼 Petronas Twin Towers
attractions.desc: The world's tallest twin towers, connected by a skybridge on the 41st and 42nd floors.

attractions.name: 🪜 Batu Caves
attractions.desc: A massive limestone hill holding a series of caves and Hindu shrines, guarded by a huge gold statue.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Bukit Bintang
attractions.desc: The shopping and entertainment beachfront district of the city, packed with malls and night markets.

attractions.name: 🗼 Kuwait Towers
attractions.desc: A group of three distinctive slender towers featuring spherical blue-green tiled main tanks.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Grand Mosque
attractions.desc: The official and largest state mosque, renowned for its classic Andalusian structural style.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Souq Al-Mubarakiya
attractions.desc: One of the oldest traditional markets in the country, authentic for dates, spices, and perfumes.

attractions.name: 🕌 Old Friday Mosque (Hukuru Miskiy)
attractions.desc: An ancient mosque dating back to 1656, built uniquely out of intricate coral stone boulders.

attractions.name: 🐟 Malé Fish Market
attractions.desc: The energetic commercial heart of the island where fresh catches are brought in daily straight from the ocean.

attractions.name: 🏖️ Artificial Beach
attractions.desc: A beautifully engineered crescent ocean swimming spot popular for water sports and evening events.

attractions.name: ¼🕌 Al Fateh Grand Mosque
attractions.desc: One of the largest mosques in the world, topped by a massive fiberglass dome structure.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Bahrain National Museum
attractions.desc: An excellent museum housing artifacts detailing 5,000 years of Dilmun civilization history.

attractions.name: 🏰 Bahrain Fort (Qal'at al-Bahrain)
attractions.desc: An exceptional UNESCO World Heritage site showcasing a preserved Portuguese military fort.

attractions.name: 🧱 Intramuros
attractions.desc: The historic walled area containing stone fortifications, Fort Santiago, and San Agustin Church.

attractions.name: 🌳 Rizal Park
attractions.desc: An iconic urban park dedicated to the national hero José Rizal, bordering Manila Bay.

attractions.name: 🌊 Manila Baywalk
attractions.desc: A seaside promenade famous for catching stunning views of the golden Manila sunset.

attractions.name: 🕌 Sultan Qaboos Grand Mosque
attractions.desc: An architectural marvel featuring a massive hand-woven prayer rug and a Swarovski chandelier.

attractions.name: 🎭 Royal Opera House Muscat
attractions.desc: Oman's premier venue for musical arts, showcasing a blend of Omani and contemporary design.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Mutrah Souq
attractions.desc: A historic covered market packed with vendor stalls selling frankincense, silver, and spices.

attractions.name: 🛕 Uppatasanti Pagoda
attractions.desc: A massive golden pagoda landmark nearly identical in shape to Yangon's Shwedagon Pagoda.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum
attractions.desc: An extensive museum facility tracking ancient kingdoms and historical Burmese artifacts.

attractions.name: 🐘 White Elephant House
attractions.desc: A specialized enclosure housing highly revered royal white elephants.

attractions.name: 🏛️ India Gate
attractions.desc: A majestic triumphal arch war memorial centered along the ceremonial Rajpath boulevard.

attractions.name: 🗼 Qutub Minar
attractions.desc: A soaring 73-meter tall five-story brick minaret built during the 13th century.

attractions.name: 🛕 Lotus Temple
attractions.desc: A Bahá'í House of Worship built in the shape of a massive pure white marble lotus flower.

attractions.name: 🚶 Ledra Street
attractions.desc: A bustling pedestrian shopping street that crosses the historic UN Green Line buffer zone.

attractions.name: 🧱 Venetian Walls
attractions.desc: A series of defensive stone walls built around the old town circular perimeter layout.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Büyük Han
attractions.desc: A beautifully restored 16th-century Ottoman roadside inn now housing art studios.

attractions.name: 👑 Royal Palace & Silver Pagoda
attractions.desc: The grand residence of the King, featuring gold leaf buildings and a silver-tiled floor temple.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum of Cambodia
attractions.desc: A stunning terracotta building housing the world's finest collection of Khmer sculpture.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Central Market (Phsar Thmei)
attractions.desc: An iconic Art Deco building with a massive central dome structure housing thousands of stalls.

attractions.name: 🗼 Juche Tower
attractions.desc: A towering 170-meter stone monument topped by a glowing red metal flame structure.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Kim Il Sung Square
attractions.desc: The massive central city plaza used for grand national military parade events.

attractions.name: 🚇 Pyongyang Metro
attractions.desc: One of the deepest subway systems in the world, lavishly decorated with chandeliers and murals.

attractions.name: 🏰 Masmak Fortress
attractions.desc: A clay and mud-brick citadel that played a crucial role in the unification of Saudi Arabia.

attractions.name: 🏙️ Kingdom Centre
attractions.desc: An iconic skyscraper featuring an inverted skybridge arch providing brilliant nighttime views.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum of Saudi Arabia
attractions.desc: A highly modern museum tracking the history of Islam and Arabian anthropology.

attractions.name: 🧱 Old City of Sanaa
attractions.desc: Famous for its unique multi-story mud-brick tower houses decorated with white gypsum patterns.

attractions.name: 🕌 Al Saleh Mosque
attractions.desc: The largest mosque in Yemen, featuring modern Yemeni architecture with high minarets.

attractions.name: 🏰 Dar al-Hajar
attractions.desc: A striking royal rock palace built completely on top of a tall natural rock pinnacle spire.

attractions.name: 🏯 Gyeongbokgung Palace
attractions.desc: The main royal palace of the Joseon dynasty, built in 1395 and framed against northern mountains.

attractions.name: 🗼 N Seoul Tower
attractions.desc: Set atop Namsan Mountain, this iconic observation tower offers panoramic views of the entire capital.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Myeongdong Shopping District
attractions.desc: A bustling hub famous for street food lanes, cosmetics boutiques, and high-energy fashion trends.

attractions.name: 🌳 Gardens by the Bay
attractions.desc: A futuristic park featuring massive, glowing Supertree structures and innovative climate domes.

attractions.name: 🏨 Marina Bay Sands SkyPark
attractions.desc: An iconic resort featuring a massive surfboard-shaped observation deck overlooking the harbor.

attractions.name: 🏝️ Sentosa Island
attractions.desc: A dedicated resort island featuring clean beaches, theme parks, and dining destinations.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Parliament Complex
attractions.desc: A stunning modern building designed by Geoffrey Bawa, built on an island in Diyawanna Lake.

attractions.name: 🌲 Diyasaru Park
attractions.desc: A peaceful wetland park ideal for birdwatching and exploring nature trails.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Kotte Raja Maha Viharaya
attractions.desc: An ancient, historic Buddhist temple dating back to the Kingdom of Kotte era.

attractions.name: 🏙️ Taipei 101
attractions.desc: A supertall skyscraper built to resemble a stalk of bamboo, featuring a massive internal wind damper.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Palace Museum
attractions.desc: Houses a nearly permanent collection of over 700,000 ancient pieces of imperial Chinese artifacts.

attractions.name: 🛍️ Shilin Night Market
attractions.desc: One of the largest and most famous food markets, celebrated for street eats like stinky tofu.

attractions.name: 🚇 Tashkent Metro Stations
attractions.desc: A historic subway network where every single station is themed with marble, tile, and chandeliers.

attractions.name: 📜 Chorsu Bazaar
attractions.desc: A colossal traditional blue-domed market selling spices, clothes, and traditional street foods.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Hazrati Imam Complex
attractions.desc: The religious heart of Tashkent, housing the world's oldest remaining Uthman Quran manuscript.

attractions.name: 🏰 Narikala Fortress
attractions.desc: An ancient fortress overlooking Tbilisi and the Kura River, accessible by a scenic cable car.

attractions.name: 🧖 Abanotubani Sulfur Baths
attractions.desc: A historic district famous for its brick dome-roofed thermal bathhouses fed by hot springs.

attractions.name: ⛪ Holy Trinity Cathedral (Sameba)
attractions.desc: One of the tallest Eastern Orthodox cathedrals in the world, dominating the city skyline.

attractions.name: 👑 Golestan Palace
attractions.desc: A lavish royal Qajar complex filled with beautiful walled gardens, tilework, and mirror-lined halls.

attractions.name: 🗼 Azadi Tower
attractions.desc: The iconic inverted-Y shaped monument marking the western entrance to the capital city.

attractions.name: 🌉 Tabiat Bridge
attractions.desc: An award-winning large multi-level pedestrian overpass bridge built across a busy highway park.

attractions.name: 🧱 Tashichho Dzong
attractions.desc: A massive Buddhist monastery and fortress that serves as the seat of Bhutan's civil government.

attractions.name: Buddha Dordenma
attractions.desc: A gigantic golden Buddha statue seated high on a hill overlooking the southern valley approach.

attractions.name: 🇧🇹 National Memorial Chorten
attractions.desc: A prominent white stupa with golden spires where locals gather daily to circumambulate in prayer.

attractions.name: 🗼 Tokyo Tower
attractions.desc: An iconic communications and observation tower in the Shiba-koen district, offering beautiful vistas.

attractions.name: ⛩️ Senso-ji Temple
attractions.desc: Tokyo's oldest, most colorful, and most significant Buddhist temple, located in Asakusa.

attractions.name: 🚶 Shibuya Crossing
attractions.desc: The world's busiest pedestrian intersection, surrounded by brilliant neon billboards.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Sukhbaatar Square
attractions.desc: The massive central public square featuring an imposing bronze statue of Genghis Khan.

attractions.name: 🛕 Gandantegchinlen Monastery
attractions.desc: A prominent, restored Tibetan-style monastery complex housing a huge indoor golden statue.

attractions.name: 🏛️ National Museum of Mongolia
attractions.desc: Tracks regional history from the Stone Age through the world-conquering Mongol Empire era.

attractions.name: 🛕 Pha That Luang
attractions.desc: A massive gold-covered Buddhist stupa generally regarded as the most important national monument.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Patuxai (Victory Gate)
attractions.desc: A monumental concrete arch reminiscent of Paris's Arc de Triomphe, decorated with Laotian motifs.

attractions.name: 🧘 Buddha Park (Xieng Khuan)
attractions.desc: An unusual open-air sculpture park containing over 200 bizarre concrete Hindu and Buddhist figures.

attractions.name: 🪜 Republic Square
attractions.desc: The central town square known for its beautiful pink tuff-stone buildings and singing fountains.

attractions.name: 🎨 Yerevan Cascade
attractions.desc: A massive limestone stairway complex featuring terraced garden fountains and outdoor modern art.

attractions.name: 🏛️ Tsitsernakaberd
attractions.desc: A deeply solemn memorial complex and museum dedicated to the history of the Armenian genocide.
